body:
## Summary
- Adds focused Search route query hydration validation to `scripts/validate-content.js`.
- Wires the new focus flag into the broad content validator summary so URL-state regressions are release-visible.

## Why
`app/search.tsx` already preserves the submit/clear URL-state contract, but the focused test expected validator coverage that did not exist yet.

## Validation
- `node --check scripts/validate-content.js`
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' node scripts/validate-content.js --focus-search-route-query-hydration`
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' node --test tests/content-search-route-copy-parity.test.js --test-name-pattern "submit|route query|URL|hydration|clear|manual typing"`
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' npm run validate:content`
- `npm run typecheck -- --pretty false`
- `git diff --check`
- `CI=1 EXPO_NO_TELEMETRY=1 NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' npm run build:web:export -- --max-workers 2`
- `CI=1 EXPO_NO_TELEMETRY=1 NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' npm run test:e2e -- tests/e2e/search-query-hydration.spec.ts --workers=1`
title: setup: validate search route query hydration
